name: HELLOJOY INC
description: Blueprint (formerly HelloJoy, founded 2016) is an AI-assisted EHR and remote patient monitoring platform for mental health therapists. Transcribes therapy sessions, drafts notes and treatment plans, automates clinical assessments, and integrates RPM between appointments. HIPAA/SOC 2 Type II compliant. Series B funded. Total funding: $28.73M.

name: SIGNAL
filter_reason: Original Signal LLC (Chicago marketing SaaS, Inc 5000 #108 in 2011) was acquired by BrightTag in May 2014, which then renamed itself Signal. Subsequently acquired by TransUnion in August 2020. No longer an independent company.

name: EVENTRIC LLC
description: Eventric is a global SaaS platform for live event and touring management. Flagship product Master Tour is trusted by thousands of professional tour managers with 80,000+ monthly active users, 150,000+ tours, and 2M+ live events across 35 countries. Serves music, sports, TV, and film industries. Closed $5M equity round December 2024 (Frontier Growth, Staircase Ventures).

name: XCART DEVELOPMENT
filter_reason: E-commerce development/consulting shop. Not a product-based SaaS startup.

name: AQUILON ENERGY SERVICES INC
filter_reason: Aquilon Energy Services (energy settlements SaaS, raised $33.6M from Citi, Goldman Sachs, Invenergy) is listed as a deadpooled/defunct company on Crunchbase. No longer operating.

name: COMMERCIAL FINANCIAL SERVICE INC
filter_reason: CCS4VMS is a vendor management/financial services company. No clear indicators of a scalable tech product startup.

name: SCIENTIFIC COMPUTING ASSOCIATES COR
filter_reason: Scientific computing consultancy incorporated 1990. Not a modern tech startup.

name: SITETRACKER INC.
description: Sitetracker is the global standard in Asset Lifecycle Management and Deployment Operations Management SaaS. Manages millions of telecom (5G, fiber), energy, and utility infrastructure sites for customers like Ericsson, Google, British Telecom, and Vodafone. $150B+ in assets managed worldwide. 190+ employees. Founded 2013 in Palo Alto. (Note: source data has typo 'sitetraker.com'; correct is sitetracker.com.)

name: AVICI SYSTEMS INC
filter_reason: Avici Systems was a networking hardware company that went bankrupt. The listed website extremenetworks.com belongs to Extreme Networks, a completely different company. Data is stale/incorrect.

name: CADZATION
filter_reason: CAD design services company. Not a software product startup.

name: RMCIS CORP
filter_reason: CrossroadsRMC is a small IT services company. Insufficient evidence of a scalable software product.

name: CONSCISYS CORPORATION
filter_reason: IT consulting and custom software development firm. Not a product-based SaaS startup.

name: WORK COMP SPECIALTY ASSOCIATES INC
filter_reason: Workers compensation services company. Not a tech startup.

name: ACTUATE CORP
filter_reason: Actuate Corporation (BI/analytics software) was acquired by OpenText in 2015. No longer an independent company.

name: TRANSMEDIA TECHNOLOGY
filter_reason: Small IT services/media technology company with insufficient verifiable information as a scalable tech startup.

name: AP PREMIER STAFFING INC
filter_reason: Staffing company. Not a tech startup.

name: EMCIEN CORP
description: Emcien provides AI-driven pattern recognition and analytics software for manufacturing companies to reduce product complexity, optimize portfolios, and improve demand forecasting. Machine learning applied to SKU rationalization and supply chain optimization. Atlanta-based analytics software company.

name: PREPARED HEALTH INC
description: PreparedHealth (rebranded to Dina in 2020, now dinacare.com) is a care coordination SaaS enabling real-time communication between healthcare providers, patients, and families for post-acute care. enTouch Network and DiNA predictive analytics tools. Reduced hospital readmissions by 50% at Bayada (300+ locations). Raised $4.2M (Chicago Ventures, Pritzker Group).

name: CD2 LEARNING
description: CD2 Learning (rebranded to Propelr) is a cloud-based LMS and learning engagement platform featuring gamification, social collaboration, personalized learning, content authoring, ecommerce, and certifications. All-in-one SaaS LMS accessible from any device. Based in Overland Park, KS. ~11 employees, $5.3M revenue.

name: CENTRO LLC
description: Centro (now Basis Technologies, basistech.com) is an enterprise media management and programmatic advertising automation platform. Automates digital media buying across search, social, and programmatic channels. 130+ employees. Founded by Shawn Riegsecker. Serves major media agencies and brands.

name: WELLSPRING WORLDWIDE, INC.
description: Wellspring (formerly Wellspring Worldwide) is the premier innovation, IP management, and technology transfer SaaS platform for universities, corporations, and government agencies. Products: Sophia (30+ modules for tech transfer) and Evolve (AI-powered TTO software). Acquired Sopheon (innovation management) in early 2024. PE investment from Resurgens Technology Partners (July 2022). 70+ countries, hundreds of enterprise customers.

name: REVEFI, INC.
description: Revefi is a data observability and cost optimization platform founded by ThoughtSpot co-founders Sanjay Agrawal and Shashank Gupta. Helps companies manage data costs, usage, and performance. Launched Raden — an AI-powered data engineer acting as 'autopilot for data teams'. HQ: Redmond, WA. Series A $20M led by Icon Ventures (Sept 2024). Total funding: $29M.

name: QUEST
filter_reason: Quest Software is a large, established IT management and security software company with 7,000+ employees. Not a startup. WA entity is likely a subsidiary registration.

name: TELLAGO INC
filter_reason: Tellago is an IT consulting and technology solutions company. Consulting/SI firm, not a product SaaS startup.

name: AUTODEMO, LLC
filter_reason: AutoDemo (founded 1998) creates interactive software demo videos and tutorials. A specialized media/production services company, not a modern scalable tech startup.
